'''Relans''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] and a rival of Moff [[Feleea]]. After the debacle of the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Relans made sure to remain within the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]].
